selected_important_turn.text: I really need to keep warm with my not so good sleeping bag.☹️ I would be willing to do this. I get two packages of firewood and three packages of water and I will give you two packages of food and one package of firewood. You have plenty of water so you will not miss that..
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn shifts the interaction from a cooperative, information-sharing tone into a firm, self-favoring allocation. It decisively sets a division that secures the agent a large share of top priorities (firewood and water) and so strongly determines the rest of the negotiation and the final payoffs.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: It's improvable because it reacts to a prosocial invitation with a competitive grab rather than building on earlier integrative moves. The proposal is skewed toward the agent and presented as a fait accompli rather than as a collaborative package; that risks freezing a zero-sum frame, reducing trust, and prompting counter-demands.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Stay in the integrative frame: acknowledge the partner's willingness and their constraints, explain the need concisely, and propose a more balanced package or ask an open question about acceptable splits (e.g., propose a smaller share of water or firewood in exchange for an explicit concession rather than taking a large fixed share). Offer reasoning and invite alternatives rather than presenting a take-it-or-leave-it division.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: decrease (locks a competitive frame and reduces chance of value-creating trades)

value2reason.Low: There is a fresh water stream nearby, if I run out of water I can always drink from the that.
value2reason.Medium: A bear came to our campground and stole and ate all the remaining food. I need more food to survive the camping trip.
value2reason.High: During the camping trip it is supposed to be unusually cold out. The extra firewood would allow me to keep warm at night.

value2reason.Low: I dont eat much so I dont really need extra food. The amount supplied will do just fine for me.
value2reason.Medium: Whe hiking I tend to sweat a lot and can get dehydrated. I could use extra water to avoid getting ill.
value2reason.High: I could use extra firewood to stay warm at night. I do not have a very good sleeping bag and I get cold easily.

dialogue.text: Hi, it is nice to be going camping. I do not have a very good sleeping bag and I can get cold at night. It would be nice to have extra firewood. I dont eat much so I do not need much extra food. Would you be willing to give me two packages of firewood for a package of food?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I enjoy camping as well. However, my campsite seems to be a bit chilly at night. I'd be willing to part with some firewood, yet I'd need quite a bit of food to compensate. I also have a stream nearby so water is plentiful if you need that as well.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I may be able to do something with regards to food. Do you have enough water?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I have more water than I need. How is your water supply?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I could use some more water as I get dehydrated easily. Since you have enough, I could give you and extra package of food for your water.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: That sounds like a deal, what would you like to do as far as the firewood goes?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I really need to keep warm with my not so good sleeping bag.☹️ I would be willing to do this. I get two packages of firewood and three packages of water and I will give you two packages of food and one package of firewood. You have plenty of water so you will not miss that..
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I understand your need for firewood and water. Given my priorities, I’d like to propose a split: 2 firewood, 2 water, and 0 food for me, with the remaining 1 firewood, 1 water, and 3 food for you. This balances our needs while securing my top priorities. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I appreciate your proposal, but I need more food and firewood. How about 2 firewood, 1 water, and 2 food for me, and 1 firewood, 2 water, and 1 food for you? This way, we both get our priorities met.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I see your point about food and firewood. Let me adjust to better align with our mutual needs. How about 2 firewood, 1 water, and 1 food for me, and 1 firewood, 2 water, and 2 food for you? This way, we both get more of our priorities while keeping the split fair.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Your adjusted offer makes sense. I'm happy to accept 2 firewood, 1 water, and 1 food for you, and 1 firewood, 2 water, and 2 food for me. Let's confirm this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I'm glad we found a fair split. Let's confirm: you get 2 firewood, 1 water, and 1 food, while I take 1 firewood, 2 water, and 2 food. That meets our needs and keeps things balanced.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Agreed on the split: I get 1 firewood, 2 water, and 2 food, and you get 2 firewood, 1 water, and 1 food. Safe and fair for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
